name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyNonConfRemoteSlv
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyNonConfRemoteSlv
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions and sends a response if a request is received.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
